text: Kept me bone dry on a stormy ridge. Packs down tiny.
Great jacket, wish it came in more colors.
Easy to pitch and roomy for two. Survived a windy night.
Warm down to freezing. A little bulky but cozy.
Best boots I've owned. No blisters on a 20km day.
Grippy and light, perfect for technical trails.
Bright and the USB-C charging is so convenient.
Fast flow and easy to use. Clean water anywhere.
Carries heavy loads comfortably. The hip belt is excellent.
Boils water fast and packs into the mug. Solid stove.
